name: Ho-ho Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 10x15x1-inch jellyroll pan.
Combine all cake ingredients. Beat until smooth. Pour into prepared
jellyroll pan. Bake for 15 minutes. Cool.
Whipped Cream Filling: Bring cornstarch and milk to a boil, stirring
constantly, until very thick. Let cool completely. Cream together butter,
Crisco, sugar and vanilla. Add the cooled mixture and beat at high speed
until fluffy. Spread over cooled cake.
Chocolate Frosting: Melt the butter, and mix in remaining ingredients
until smooth. Pour over Whipped Cream Filling. Refrigerate until frosting
is set.
